title: Disc Construction
description: Craft discs with gems, and some more difficult to obtain materials...
body:
You can now craft music discs with a compatible music disc (any disc that can be crafted), paper, glowstone, and a disc-specific resource! (Check gallery recipe screenshots)

Disc Resources:
- 13: Gold Ingot
- cat: Emerald
- blocks: Copper
- chirp: Redstone Dust
- far: Torchflower Seeds
- mall: Amethyst Shard
- mellohi: Chorus Fruit
- stal: Coal
- strad: Nether Quartz
- ward: Scute
- wait: Lapis Lazuli
- otherside: Ender Pearl
